text: {"claims":[{"statement":"Oluwaseyi Oso is listed as the author of the article “The Nigerian dream of freedom”.","claimType":"empirical","quote":"By [Oluwaseyi Oso]","entailment":"The byline “By [Oluwaseyi Oso]” directly indicates that he authored the article.","population":"","intervention":"","comparator":"","outcome":"","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"","modality":"descriptive"},{"statement":"Oluwaseyi Oso is associated with The Nation (Nigeria).","claimType":"definitional","quote":"**As seen in:** [The Nation (Nigeria)]","entailment":"The profile lists The Nation (Nigeria) under “As seen in,” indicating an association.","population":"","intervention":"","comparator":"","outcome":"","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"","modality":"definitional"},{"statement":"Oluwaseyi Oso is associated with TheCable.","claimType":"definitional","quote":"[TheCable]","entailment":"The profile includes TheCable in the list of outlets where his work appears, showing an association.","population":"","intervention":"","comparator":"","outcome":"","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"","modality":"definitional"},{"statement":"Oluwaseyi Oso is associated with Global Patriot News.","claimType":"definitional","quote":"[Global Patriot News]","entailment":"The profile lists Global Patriot News among the outlets that feature his work, indicating an association.","population":"","intervention":"","comparator":"","outcome":"","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"","modality":"definitional"}]}
